scripts.help: node -e "const s=require('./package.json').scripts,d={help:'Show this help', 'web:dev':'Run Next.js web app in dev mode (hot reload)','web:build':'Build the web app for production','web:start':'Start the built web app','web:lint':'Lint the web app','shared:build':'Build the @villa-events/shared package','shared:test':'Run tests in the shared package',build:'Build all workspaces (recursive)',test:'Run tests in all workspaces (recursive)'};console.log('\nVilla Events — pnpm scripts\n');for(const k of Object.keys(s)){console.log('  pnpm '+k.padEnd(16)+'  '+(d[k]||s[k]))}console.log('')"
